greeting: I'm here to help you understand and manage life changes that might impact your benefits. Tell me what's happening, and I'll guide you through the process.

suggestedPrompts.title: What is a QLE?
suggestedPrompts.prompt: What is a Qualifying Life Event (QLE) and what are some common types?

suggestedPrompts.title: Marriage & Benefits
suggestedPrompts.prompt: I got married on `2026-01-10`. How do I add my spouse, `Jordan A`, to my `medical_plan` and other benefits?

suggestedPrompts.title: New Child Benefits
suggestedPrompts.prompt: My child, `Casey A`, was born on `2025-11-02`. What do I need to do to add them to my benefits?

suggestedPrompts.title: Spouse Lost Coverage
suggestedPrompts.prompt: My spouse lost their other coverage on `2026-02-01`. I want to `Enroll spouse after spouse loses coverage`. What `documentation` do I need?

suggestedPrompts.title: Moving States
suggestedPrompts.prompt: I am moving my `Home/Residential` address from `NJ` to `PA`. How does this affect my benefits and what do I need to update?

suggestedPrompts.title: Divorce Documents
suggestedPrompts.prompt: What `documentation` is required to update my benefits due to a `Divorce/legal separation/annulment`?
